title: Unify avatar source across post display and new post form
spec: Identify the single source of truth for the user's avatar URL (e.g. `session.user.image` from NextAuth v5 or the `image` field on the Prisma `User` model). Audit every component that renders an avatar — specifically the component that shows the avatar on an existing post (e.g. `PostCard.tsx` or similar) and the component that shows the avatar in the new-post composer/form (e.g. `NewPostForm.tsx` or similar). Both must read the avatar from the same field: prefer `useSession().data.user.image` on the client, or the `author.image` relation on the post object fetched from the database. If one component uses a hardcoded fallback, a different field name, or a stale prop while the other uses the live session image, align them. Acceptance criteria: logging in with any account and viewing an existing post shows the identical avatar as the one displayed in the new-post composer for that same account. Add a comment above each avatar `` (or ``) tag referencing the canonical field name to prevent future drift.
